summary_en: Annual dividend raised to ¥5.00/share (interim ¥3.00 + final ¥2.00) from prior guidance of ¥4.00/share for FY2/27. Interim raised from ¥2.00 to ¥3.00 to include 30th anniversary special dividend of ¥1.00/share; final unchanged at ¥2.00.
title_en: Notice Regarding Revision of Dividend Forecast (30th Anniversary Dividend Increase)
translation_en_brief: j-Group Holdings revised its FY2/27 (ending Feb 28, 2027) dividend forecast on May 28, 2026. The company raised its annual dividend from the prior guidance of ¥4.00 per share to ¥5.00 per share, marking a ¥1.00 increase. The interim dividend (second quarter) was lifted from ¥2.00 to ¥3.00 per share, with the additional ¥1.00 designated as a 30th anniversary commemorative dividend. The final (year-end) dividend remains ¥2.00 per share. The revision was motivated by the company's 30th anniversary milestone in March 2026, expressed as gratitude to shareholders for their ongoing support.
